statics.description: CARDNAME's power and toughness are each equal to the number of cards in your hand.

triggers.description: When CARDNAME enters, draw a card.
At the beginning of each upkeep, if no spells were cast last turn, transform CARDNAME.

statics.description: CARDNAME's power and toughness are each equal to the total number of cards in all players' hands.

triggers.description: At the beginning of each upkeep, if a player cast two or more spells last turn, transform CARDNAME.
